hero.title: We Are
hero.description: A digital agency on a mission to transform ideas into successful digital products. Since 2016, we've been helping businesses innovate, grow, and succeed online.

values.title: What Drives
values.description: The principles that guide everything we do

resultsDriven.title: Results-driven
resultsDriven.description: We focus on measurable outcomes and ROI. Every decision is guided by data and aligned with your business goals.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: Your success is our success. We work as an extension of your team, committed to your long-term growth.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace new technologies and creative solutions. Staying ahead means constantly learning and evolving.

dataInformed.title: Data-informed
dataInformed.description: Every strategy is backed by research and analytics. We let data guide our decisions, not assumptions.

timeline.title: Company
timeline.description: From a small startup to a leading digital agency

2016.title: Founded
2016.description: Innovayse was founded by a team of passionate developers and marketers

2018.title: First 50 Projects
2018.description: Reached milestone of 50 completed projects and expanded to 15 team members

2020.title: International Expansion
2020.description: Started working with international clients across Europe and North America

2022.title: Launched SaaS Division
2022.description: Released SmartLearn System and PropSystem Pro - our first SaaS products

2023.title: Team Growth
2023.description: Grew to 50+ team members and opened new office space

2024.title: AI Integration
2024.description: Integrated AI capabilities across all services and launched Kelpie AI

2025.title: Looking Forward
2025.description: Expanding product line and focusing on enterprise solutions

techStack.title: Our
techStack.description: We work with cutting-edge technologies to deliver exceptional results

cta.title: Ready to
cta.description: Let's bring your ideas to life together

contact.title: Start a Project
contact.description: Let's discuss your ideas and bring them to life
